title: helianthus niveus
intro: Helianthus niveus, also known as the silver sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Helianthus niveus have been reported to have health benefits such as relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and improving respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
